ARIA Roles Missing Required Properties Test Page

These elements have ARIA roles that require specific owned properties — but those properties are absent.

role="checkbox" — requires aria-checked

Accept terms and conditions

role="radio" — requires aria-checked

Option A

role="switch" — requires aria-checked

Enable notifications

role="slider" — requires aria-valuenow, aria-valuemin, aria-valuemax

Volume

role="combobox" — requires aria-expanded

Select an option

role="scrollbar" — requires aria-valuenow, aria-valuemin, aria-valuemax, aria-controls

Back to index
